rows.label: tev011901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev011901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Dirk about the new crew member.

rows.label: tev011901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev011901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Dirk if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev011901_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Dirk about the new crew member.

rows.label: tev011901_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Dirk about Soul Voices.

rows.label: tev011901_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Dirk about indigens.

rows.label: tev011901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Dirk about recent developments.

rows.label: tev011901_SEL1051
rows.name: Ask Dirk about indigens.

rows.label: tev011901_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Dirk about recent developments.

rows.label: tev011901_SEL2031
rows.name: Ask Dirk about recent developments.

rows.label: tev011901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yeah, I heard that Elma finally
discovered a new crew member on
one of her search missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG0002
rows.name:
I wonder what happened to that survivor?
I'm guessing [ST:gender p1=he p2=she ] probably became a BLADE?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Maybe I'll run into [ST:gender p1=him p2=her ] one day. It
would be great if we hit it off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG0004
rows.name:
The rest of my team is all seasoned
veterans, so it would be nice to have a
chance to talk with a fellow new recruit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG0005
rows.name:
Not that I'm complaining, mind you.
Experienced BLADEs like Fine have a
lot of great advice to throw my way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00010
rows.name:
I gotta admit, I have a terrible
sense of direction. I'm always
getting lost on bounty missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00011
rows.name:
Adelbert—that's the leader of
my team, Team Jaeger— gave me
a good piece of advice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00012
rows.name:
He said, "When you get lost, look for the trail.
Following the footprints of one who came before
is a sure path to finding your way home."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00013
rows.name:
Yeah, that Adelbert's a
really impressive guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00014
rows.name:
Problem is, when I was following
the trail back to NLA, I ended up
way out west in Nightglow Forest![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00015
rows.name:
It caused a lot of trouble for my
team. Aaaaagain. There has to be
a better way to stay on track.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00020
rows.name:
I've heard a lot about that new
BLADE lately. I think [ST:gender p1=his p2=her ] name is [ST:playername ]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00021
rows.name:
They say [ST:gender p1=he p2=she ] killed an Overed
on [ST:gender p1=his p2=her ] very first mission![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00022
rows.name:
That's incredible. I mean, I'm
a Avalancher and all, but Overeds
are way out of my league.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00023
rows.name:
Heck, I can barely handle the
ovis that roam around here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00024
rows.name:
It's pathetic that I have to ask someone newer
than me for advice, but I sure wish that new
BLADE would teach me [ST:gender p1=his p2=her ] combat secrets![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00029
rows.name:
Fine taught me to listen carefully
to my companions' voices in battle
and approach foes accordingly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00030
rows.name:
She said that would let me fight with greater
strength than usual, and that it would even help
me get back on my feet after I've taken a beating.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00031
rows.name:
I still have trouble paying attention to
the voices around me when I'm focused on
fighting the enemy in front of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG00032
rows.name:
But I hope I'll learn how to turn
their voices into power and start
bringing down Overeds soon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1001
rows.name:
Some indigens are so
indiscriminately violent,
they'll even attack other indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1002
rows.name:
Adelbert was really smart
about using them to attack
and weaken our bounty targets.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1003
rows.name:
He was really an incredible guy. I don't know
that there's anyone you'd have wanted by your
side more when battling a dangerous foe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1009
rows.name:
Fine's finally managed
to calm down a bit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1010
rows.name:
But she still has
nightmares every night.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1011
rows.name:
I suppose that's to be expected. I don't care how
strong you are—nobody can watch a friend get killed
before their eyes and not have it affect them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1012
rows.name: The wound in her heart may never heal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1013
rows.name:
I'd trade my own life to
save her if I could.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1020
rows.name:
I've heard rumors about indigens
that can control the weather.
You probably have too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1021
rows.name:
I know there are indigens that become
unbelievably strong in specific weather
conditions, but controlling it? No thanks, mister![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1022
rows.name:
Anyway, if you allow them to engage you
in their preferred environmental conditions,
you are in for a world of pain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1023
rows.name:
So always pay attention to the weather
when battling an unfamiliar enemy.
Your life could depend on it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1030
rows.name:
Some monsters are so violent once they're
enraged, they won't calm down until they've
obliterated everything around them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1031
rows.name:
Everyone in Team Jaeger knew to battle
such foes with extremely rapid attacks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1032
rows.name:
Adelbert would charge in and
strike the beast's belly, while
Grette and Fine backed him up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1033
rows.name:
They'd bring the creature down without
giving it time to mount a counterattack,
much less become enraged.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG1034
rows.name:
Yeah, they fought like a well-oiled
machine. Even after what happened, I'm
proud to have been a part of that team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG2001
rows.name:
Corondas invited me to do some
missions with his team the other day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG2002
rows.name:
After what happened to my old team, I was ready
to quit BLADE entirely. It was nice to know there
was still someone who wanted to work with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG2003
rows.name:
But I had to turn him down. I don't think
I could bear to go through that again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG2004
rows.name:
And besides, my place is here
now. ...Protecting Fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG2009
rows.name:
I heard that Corondas was
killed in the line of duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG2010
rows.name:
Pathfinder like him were the tip
of the spear in terms of opening
up Mira to human activity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG2011
rows.name:
Without those kind of people around,
what's going to become of BLADE?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011901_MSG2012
rows.name:
Will we even be able to
survive on this damn planet?[ST:wait ]
